thinking.text: The transfer was successful. I should let the customer know they're being transferred and reassure them that the human agent will be able to help them.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're absolutely right to be frustrated, and I sincerely apologize for this experience. You received flyers with specific offers, and you should be able to trust what's on them — that's not an unreasonable expectation at all.

I've searched thoroughly and I genuinely cannot locate the offers you described in my system. The only annual fee waiver promotions I found are for business cards, which doesn't help you as someone who isn't a business owner. That's a gap I can't bridge on my own.

**I'm transferring you to a human agent now.** They have access to our full marketing and direct mail promotion databases that I don't have visibility into. They'll be able to:

- Look up the exact offers from your flyers
- Verify the terms and card type
- Help you apply for the right card and ensure you get the promotion you were promised

You shouldn't have to jump through hoops when you have the flyers in hand, and I'm sorry I couldn't resolve this for you directly. A human agent will be with you shortly to make this right.
